lines.speaker: Sarble
lines.text: La La La, toadies in their holeys! .. Oh hello, I didn't notice you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, What do you do here?

lines.speaker: Sarble
lines.text: I look after the toads and worms. They are very useful in gnome cooking, don't you know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Does singing to the toads help them grow?

lines.speaker: Sarble
lines.text: Don't be silly, I just sing to pass the time while looking after them!

lines.speaker: Sarble
lines.text: Thank you kindly, you might want to grab some toads and worms while you are here.
